title: String literals should not be duplicated
description: Avoid duplicating string literals within the same file. Duplicated string literals can make code harder to maintain.
recommendation: Replace the duplicated string literal with a constant.
why_is_this_an_issue: Duplicated string literals can make code harder to maintain and increase the risk of errors.
how_to_fix: Replace the duplicated string literal with a constant.

metadata.title: String literals should not be duplicated
